description: Pizza Hut pricing foundation with a modeled market, channel, menu, and weekly performance panel.
main_grain: week_start x brand_id x market_id x product_id x channel_id

processed/brand_dim.csv.description: Pizza Hut brand attributes and positioning metadata.

processed/market_dim.csv.description: Modeled market attribute dimension with pricing, digital, and competition indices.

processed/brand_market_network.csv.description: Pizza Hut market footprint and ownership proxy metrics.

processed/brand_channel_dim.csv.description: Pizza Hut channel support, mix, and elasticity modifiers.

processed/product_dim.csv.description: Pizza Hut menu ladder with economics and elasticity priors.

processed/calendar_week_dim.csv.description: Weekly calendar dimension with event windows and demand flags.

processed/external_macro_monthly.csv.description: Macro context used to modulate pricing pressure and consumer demand.

processed/promo_calendar.csv.grain: week_start x brand_id x market_id x campaign_id
processed/promo_calendar.csv.description: Pizza Hut campaign cadence by market.

processed/cross_brand_transfer_matrix.cs.description: Unused placeholder file kept for schema compatibility.

processed/brand_market_product_channel_w.grain: week_start x brand_id x market_id x product_id x channel_id
processed/brand_market_product_channel_w.description: Main modeled Pizza Hut elasticity panel.

processed/brand_market_channel_week_pane.grain: week_start x brand_id x market_id x channel_id
processed/brand_market_channel_week_pane.description: Derived Pizza Hut channel operating panel with orders and checks.

processed/product_week_summary.csv.description: Pizza Hut item weekly summary with elasticity weighting.

processed/data_quality_checks.csv.description: Build-level row counts and integrity checks.
